title: I Release the Old Family Money Story and Allow a New One
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the inherited money story and opening to a new family line of abundance
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 77 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the old story carried from family history. The allow names the new story: already in motion, already changing what the next generation inherits.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 77 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 77 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 77 theme: claiming a new wealthy family story. The release names the old story carried from family history. The allow names the new one: already forming, already changing what comes next.
I am ready to release every money story I inherited from my family, the struggle, the scarcity, the limits passed down through generations. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow a new family story of abundance, comfort, and ease, already forming through me and rippling forward into every generation that follows. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 77 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
